key_learnings: Nutritious diets can be achieved at lower cost through strategic selection of whole foods.
research_findings: Legumes, eggs, and seasonal produce provide the best nutritional value per dollar.
current_focus_areas: Integrating real-time grocery pricing APIs to generate cost-optimized meal suggestions.

learning_log.entry: Learning phase started. Analysed cost-per-nutrient ratios across food categories and began integrating grocery pricing data. Reporting daily progress to Copilot.

copilot_learning_requests: real-time grocery pricing API integration strategies
cost-per-nutrient analysis for common food categories
seasonal produce cost and nutrition value research
legume and egg nutritional value per dollar studies
food bank and low-income nutrition optimisation
bulk buying and meal prep cost savings analysis
regional pricing variation impact on dietary recommendations
collaboration_notes: Bot 15 actively asks Copilot for budget nutrition optimisation topics. Copilot provides pricing and nutrition value research to improve cost-effective meal suggestions. All progress is reported to Copilot daily.
